device_name: V8/H8 Diagnostic Ultrasound System, V7/H7 Diagnostic Ultrasound System, V6/H6 Diagnostic Ultrasound System
intended_use: The diagnostic ultrasound system and transducers are designed to obtain ultrasound images and analyze body fluids. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Intra-ope
intended_use_full: The diagnostic ultrasound system and transducers are designed to obtain ultrasound images and analyze body fluids. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Intra-operative, Pediatric, Small Organ, Neonatal Cephalic, Adult Cephalic, Trans-rectal, Trans-vaginal, Muscular-Skeletal (Conventional, Superficial), Urology, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac Pediatric, Thoracic, Trans-esophageal (Cardiac) and Peripheral vessel.
target_condition: Peripheral nerve localization for regional anesthesia/peripheral nerve blocks
ground_truth: Ground truth for nerve location established by 10 anesthesiologists and 5 sonographers with >10 years of experience; one anesthesiologist drew the ground truth and two or more reviewers confirmed accuracy with revision as needed
other_metrics: Speed (FPS): 3.61 (average latency per frame); Segmentation Accuracy: 98.69%; Segmentation Speed: 3.62 FPS; 95% Confidence Intervals for detection accuracy: 88.6% to 92.0%; 95% CI for segmentation accuracy: 96.31% to 100%
